context: Iodine Fluorescence Imaging Technique:  collimated beam of 60 keV gamma photons from an 241Am source is directed at thyroid, which results in production of K-characteristic x-rays of 28.5 keV; x-rays are detected by semiconductor detector Advantages: Disadvantage:   dedicated equipment necessary
